problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Combining Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
